info.title: Microsoft HorizonDb Management API
info.description: Azure Resource Provider API for managing HorizonDb clusters, pools, replicas, and firewall rules

get.description: List the operations for the provider
Lists all HorizonDb clusters in a subscription
Lists all HorizonDb clusters in a resource group
Gets information about a HorizonDb cluster

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster

put.description: Creates a new HorizonDb cluster or updates an existing cluster

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource create parameters.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Updates an existing HorizonDb cluster (e.g., tags, vCores, replica count)

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

HorizonDbCluster.description: Concrete tracked resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.
The properties that can be updated for a HorizonDb cluster.

value.description: The HorizonDbCluster items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

version.description: The version of the HorizonDb cluster

pointInTimeUTC.description: Restore point creation time (ISO8601 format), specifying the time to restore from

poolName.description: The pool name for restore or replica operations

availabilityZone.description: The availability zone of the HorizonDb cluster

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cluster
